nodes.name: Deleornis
nodes.summary: Deleornis（Deleornis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如Grey-headed sunbird、Fraser's sunbird。

nodes.name: Grey-headed sunbird
nodes.summary: Grey-headed sunbird（Deleornis axillaris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Grey-headed sunbird。

nodes.name: Grey-headed sunbird
nodes.summary: The grey-headed sunbird (Deleornis axillaris) is a small passerine bird which breeds in mixed forest in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and western Uganda. This sunbird is sometimes treated as a subspecies of Fraser's sunbird, Deleornis fraseri, but is not known to intergrade. Both taxa are sometimes placed in Anthreptes. References
